narrative:
Precinct Jackson (precinct in Van Wert County) has 340 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.6 percentage points.
